Skip to contents
pondeR 1.0
  • Get Started
  • Reference
    • Introduction
    • Introduction to pondeR

Package index

Descriptive Statistics

Functions for generating publication-ready summary and descriptive statistics tables.

run_anthroindex()
Compute WHO Anthropometric Z-Scores and Nutritional Status
run_summarytable()
Performs Descriptive Statistics on a Dataframe

Group Comparisons

Functions for comparing groups via parametric and non-parametric tests, with automatic test selection and effect-size reporting.

run_diff()
Automatic Statistical Comparison with Comprehensive Analysis
plot_diff()
Create Box or Violin Plots with Statistical Comparisons
run_foldchange()
Fold Change Analysis Across Groups
run_assoc()
Automatic Statistical Comparison for Categorical Variables

Regression & Classification

Logistic regression and AUC/AUROC analysis functions with publication-ready outputs and optional Firth correction.

run_logreg()
Perform Binary Logistic Regression (Standard or Firth-Corrected) with Iterative Feature Combinations
run_auc()
Comprehensive Area Under the ROC Curve (AUROC) Analysis

Dimensionality Reduction

PCA-based dimensionality reduction, scree plots, and score plots for multivariate data exploration.

run_pca()
Perform Principal Component Analysis
run_reduce()
Reduce Multiple Data Frames by Common or Unique Column/Row Names
plot_scree()
Plot PCA Scree Plot
plot_score()
Scores Plot for Multivariate Ordination Results

Visualisation

Standalone plotting functions for volcano plots and other figures.

plot_volcano()
Volcano Plot for Fold Change and P-value Data

Data Pre-processing

Metabolomics-focused data pre-processing utilities including imputation, normalisation, filtering, scaling, and batch correction.

run_mvimpute()
Impute Missing Values in Metabolomics Data
run_normalize()
Normalize Metabolomics Data
run_scale()
Scale Metabolomics Data
run_transform()
Transform Metabolomics Data
run_filterRSD()
Filter Features by Relative Standard Deviation in QC Samples
run_filtermissing()
Filter Features by Missing Value Threshold
run_filtervariance()
Filter Features by Low Variance
run_driftBatchCorrect()
Correct Signal Drift and Batch Effects Using QC Samples

Utilities & Helpers

Utility functions for data management, relabelling, and S3 methods.

run_relabel()
Recode and Factorize a Column
print(<plot_volcano>)
Print Method for plot_volcano Objects
print(<run_assoc>)
Print method for run_assoc objects
print(<run_assoc_error>)
Print method for run_assoc_error objects
print(<run_assoc_multi>)
Print method for run_assoc_multi objects
print(<run_auc>)
Print Method for run_auc Objects
print(<run_diff>)
Print method for run_diff objects
print(<run_foldchange>)
Print Method for run_foldchange Objects
print(<run_reduce>)
Print Method for run_reduce Objects
summary(<run_assoc>)
Summary method for run_assoc objects
summary(<run_assoc_multi>)
Summary method for run_assoc_multi objects
summary(<run_diff>)
Summary method for run_diff objects

Other

Additional exported functions. New functions land here automatically until formally categorised.

get_groupsizes()
Inspect Group Sample Sizes That May Trigger CV Fold Reduction in run_regreg()
get_removed_samples()
Get Samples Removed by run_regreg() Due to Missing Covariate Data
get_sigfeatures()
Get Features with Non-Zero Coefficients from a Regularized Regression Result
has_inf()
Check if an Object Contains Infinite Values
has_na()
Check if an Object Contains Missing Values
has_names()
Check if an Object has Names
has_negative()
Check if an Object Contains Negative Values
has_zero()
Check if an Object Contains Zero Values
is_list()
Check if an Object is a Plain List
is_tabular()
Check if an Object is a Tabular Data Structure
plot_beforeafter()
Plot Pairwise Before-and-After Comparison for Selected Features
plot_dend()
Plot a Hierarchical Clustering Dendrogram
plot_diff()
Create Box or Violin Plots with Statistical Comparisons
plot_dist_beforeafter()
Plot Distribution Comparison Before and After Data Transformation
plot_heatmap()
Plot a Correlation Heatmap
plot_meanmap()
Mean Intensity Heatmap with Hierarchical Clustering Dendrogram
plot_mixedmodel()
Plot Results from a Linear Mixed-Effects Model Analysis
plot_multi_y()
Plot Multiple Variables on Primary and Secondary Y Axes
plot_relabund()
Plot Relative Abundance as Stacked Bar Chart
plot_score()
Scores Plot for Multivariate Ordination Results
plot_scree()
Plot PCA Scree Plot
plot_volcano()
Volcano Plot for Fold Change and P-value Data
print(<plot_volcano>)
Print Method for plot_volcano Objects
print(<run_assoc>)
Print method for run_assoc objects
print(<run_assoc_error>)
Print method for run_assoc_error objects
print(<run_assoc_multi>)
Print method for run_assoc_multi objects
print(<run_auc>)
Print Method for run_auc Objects
print(<run_diff>)
Print method for run_diff objects
print(<run_foldchange>)
Print Method for run_foldchange Objects
print(<run_reduce>)
Print Method for run_reduce Objects
run_DIpreprocess()
Direct-Injection Metabolomics Preprocessing Pipeline
run_anthroindex()
Compute WHO Anthropometric Z-Scores and Nutritional Status
run_assoc()
Automatic Statistical Comparison for Categorical Variables
run_auc()
Comprehensive Area Under the ROC Curve (AUROC) Analysis
run_correl()
Perform Correlation Analysis
run_diff()
Automatic Statistical Comparison with Comprehensive Analysis
run_driftBatchCorrect()
Correct Signal Drift and Batch Effects Using QC Samples
run_filterRSD()
Filter Features by Relative Standard Deviation in QC Samples
run_filtermissing()
Filter Features by Missing Value Threshold
run_filtervariance()
Filter Features by Low Variance
run_foldchange()
Fold Change Analysis Across Groups
run_logreg()
Perform Binary Logistic Regression (Standard or Firth-Corrected) with Iterative Feature Combinations
run_mixedmodel()
Perform Linear Mixed-Effects Model Analysis
run_move_names()
Move Row or Column Names into the Data Area
run_mvimpute()
Impute Missing Values in Metabolomics Data
run_normalize()
Normalize Metabolomics Data
run_pca()
Perform Principal Component Analysis
run_pcoa()
Principal Coordinate Analysis (PCoA) with Optional PERMANOVA and Post-hoc
run_pls()
Perform Partial Least Squares (PLS) Analysis
run_randomize()
Randomize a Data Frame, Matrix, or Vector
run_reduce()
Reduce Multiple Data Frames by Common or Unique Column/Row Names
run_regreg()
Regularized Regression with Cross-Validation (Ridge, Elastic Net, LASSO)
run_relabel()
Recode and Factorize a Column
run_scale()
Scale Metabolomics Data
run_summarytable()
Performs Descriptive Statistics on a Dataframe
run_transform()
Transform Metabolomics Data
save_excel()
Save Data Frames, Tibbles, or Matrices to an Excel File
save_plots()
Save Plots to Image or Vector Files
summary(<run_assoc>)
Summary method for run_assoc objects
summary(<run_assoc_multi>)
Summary method for run_assoc_multi objects
summary(<run_diff>)
Summary method for run_diff objects
